name: roughlogic
description: Field math for the trades. A 100% client-side static site.

scripts.lint: node scripts/grep-checks.mjs && node scripts/check-ngrams.mjs && node scripts/check-v6-discipline.mjs && node scripts/check-manifests.mjs && node scripts/check-citation-freshness.mjs && node scripts/build-citation-strings.mjs --check && node scripts/check-discoverability.mjs && node scripts/check-worked-examples.mjs && node scripts/check-tile-meta.mjs && node scripts/check-wiring.mjs && node scripts/check-module-sizes.mjs && node scripts/check-home-payload.mjs
scripts.clean: node -e "import('node:fs').then(f => f.rmSync('dist', { recursive: true, force: true }))"
